
## install libraries 
```{r}
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install("GEOquery")
library(GEOquery)

```

## load data from GEOquery
dataset: GSE283536
```{r}
data_GEO <- getGEO("GSE283536", GSEMatrix = TRUE)
expression_data <- exprs(data_GEO[[1]])
# check the dimensions of the expression matrix
dim(expression_data)
print(expression_data[1:4, 1:4])
```
